title: Mining and creative world
description: Adds a mining and creative dimension
body:
items will be cleared when exiting the creative dimension!!!



Ever wanted to mine a lot of ores or just wanted to build stuff in creative mode?

If so you have come to the right mod. This mod adds

A mining dimension whit a diamond and normal mine. (more planned in the futere)
A creative mode dimension wich puts you from survival in creative mode.


The stone on a stick those not have recipe yet!!

This is my first uploaded mod.

created using MCreator!!!
